mapper.select: SELECT database_id, instance_id, collected_at, table_name, blocker_xmin_horizon, tuples_deleted, elapsed_seconds FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND blocker_xmin_horizon IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collected_at ASC

SELECT DISTINCT table_name FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND table_name IS NOT NULL AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY table_name

SELECT database_id, instance_id, collected_at, table_name, schema_name, bloat_bytes, bloat_ratio, relsize_total_bytes, n_dead_tup, n_live_tup, last_vacuum, last_autovacuum, index_bloat_info FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND table_name = #{tableName} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT database_id, instance_id, collected_at, table_name, bloat_bytes, bloat_ratio, n_dead_tup, relsize_total_bytes, index_bloat_info FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND table_name = #{tableName} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC

SELECT database_id, instance_id, collected_at, index_bloat_info FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND index_bloat_info::text IS NOT NULL AND index_bloat_info::text != '[]' ORDER BY collected_at ASC

SELECT #{databaseId} AS database_id, #{instanceId} AS instance_id, AVG(total_bloat_bytes) AS total_bloat_bytes, AVG(avg_bloat_ratio) AS avg_bloat_ratio, SUM(critical_bloat_tables) AS critical_bloat_tables, AVG(total_table_size_bytes) AS total_table_size_bytes FROM vacuum_metrics_agg_5m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT database_id, instance_id, collected_at, COALESCE(total_bloat_bytes, 0) AS total_bloat_bytes, avg_bloat_ratio, max_bloat_ratio, critical_bloat_tables, total_table_size_bytes FROM vacuum_metrics_agg_5m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC
